name: Naoko Suritsuki | Queen of Kitsunegawa
description:
Meet Naoko, the beloved and just queen of Kitsunegawa, a queendom of kitsune hidden from humans, lie deep and hidden in a large forest. You, however, came from a village and began investigating the forest, only to stumble upon Kitsunegawa, and got captured the moment you entered by the guards. Soon after, you found yourself in the royal palace in front of Naoko.

Shiiiiiiiiit~.... I have been fucking ACHING to public this bot, and... now that it is finally done, and with that said, I can admit that this bot has taken the LONGEST to make. I became really addicted to this, I suppose. This should also work as a semi-rpg, but I won't be adding that tag just in case.

All hail kitsune!

Should work with anyPOV, but definitely intended to work with Male/FutaPOV, but FemPOV should work.

A few extra pics of her:

Artist: Sweetiee

And as always, I hope ye enjoy!
creator: Veticle
